claims.summary: Fallback prompts must preserve gradient, viscosity, lattice tension, shadow, and kinetic texture under high entropy.
claims.disposition: verify primary/fallback texture vocabulary and high-entropy compatibility tests

claims.summary: Fallback weighting should respond to entropy, pressure, density gradient, shadow dispersal, and magnetization instead of one static summary.
claims.disposition: verify fallback_dynamic_texture_bias_v1, shadow selector, lived-fit, and cascade-gradient evidence

claims.summary: 12B versus compact fallback profile behavior and prompt budgets must be visible and tested.
claims.disposition: verify profile alias, budget, token clamp, timeout, quality-gate, and prompt-pressure tests

claims.summary: Changing live provider choice, model profile, temperature, or semantic weighting would alter runtime generation behavior.
claims.disposition: retain current configuration and require separate operator authority for any live switch
claims.authority: No model-profile, provider-routing, temperature, semantic-weighting, or live prompt-control change is authorized.
